artifacts.redacted_summary: Support guidance was sanitized to remove personal routing details, internal identifiers, and team-channel provenance. Verified reusable guidance includes: direct users to adjust bot visibility in the bot administration console when a bot cannot be found or added; avoid reusing the same chat bot across unrelated tools or agents because it can cause missing or duplicate replies; use the product console’s scheduled-task management area to review or cancel recurring tasks. For ordinary messages outside defined trigger scenarios, the bot should remain silent.
